metadata.description: live-memory — a cheap, persistent, read-only codebase memory your agent queries via ask_live_memory instead of re-reading files. A standalone shofer.dev Claude Code plugin.

plugins.name: live-memory
plugins.description: A cheap, persistent codebase memory for Claude Code — so your agent stops re-reading the repo. A separate large-context model learns your codebase passively across sessions and answers via the ask_live_memory MCP tool instead of re-loading files; read-only, zero-config on a Claude subscription.
